integration_evidence.summary: API server exposes GET /admission/health and self-check covers the App-facing admission health response.
Capability run list query skips stale partial records while single-run reads remain strict; self-check covers stale record behavior.
Core resolves Lode assets, calls Harbor runtime API client, and routes the result through existing admission/Run Record logic.
API server exposes POST /tasks and can wire Lode registry and Harbor runtime URLs from environment variables.
Focused self-check validates Harbor readiness/provider/session/snapshot/evidence calls and fail-closed behavior.
API server package test now launches built dist/index.js with a real run-record directory and verifies App-facing admission health plus capability-runs query behavior at process level.
